reviews.text: Ciera & Kaitlyn were an absolute dream team to work with for our micro wedding. They were incredibly detail oriented, patient, resourceful, communicative, helpful, and friendly. They took some of our loose ideas and brought them to life, made recommendations we hadn’t thought of, and ensured the whole weekend went perfectly. From a champagne tower, to tables overflowing with flowers, velvet napkins, the ceremony on a private ranch, to a guitarist learning new songs… it was everything we could have hoped for and more.

Lucky Penny did an amazing job with Marissa and I's wedding. We were in planning for just over a year and everything on wedding day went off without a hitch. We did a multi-location wedding day with our ceremony location separate from our reception and they helped plan transportation between both locations and had both sites setup amazing.

They helped with all arrangements with Bartending, Catering, and Entertainment with multiple recommendations for each. They were also super flexible with meetings and had great communication.

Can't recommend them enough, we wouldn't have changed a single thing at our wedding.

We cannot say enough good things about Lucky Penny and our planners, Kaitlyn and Ciera. Picking a wedding planner can feel so intimidating, and though we met with 8-10 different planners, Lucky Penny immediately stood out for their willingness to engage in the uncertain and bring to life unique ideas for a wedding. They’re a dynamic duo; Ciera is truly a design visionary, and Kaitlyn is incredibly efficient and effective. They live and breath their business, and are chock full of helpful insight and guidance that saved us hours of time and thousands of dollars.

We worked with Ciera and Kaitlyn for over two years on every aspect of our wedding in Vail, CO, from design to logistics, and they were truly exceptional. We never once felt out of sync with them, and had clarity on our planning progress every step of the way. I still remember the elation my wife felt when she first saw the design board Lucky Penny put together - ideas previously in her head come to life! We never once had to follow up about the status of a to-do, or wait on an email to be answered. Together, they are the perfect blend of creativity and execution—visionary ideas paired with flawless organization and follow-through. Planning a wedding is no small feat, but Kaitlyn and Ciera made the entire process feel manageable and even enjoyable!

Our wedding day, the culmination of all this work felt like an absolute dream. The final product of our design dreams came out even better than we could’ve imagined! And most importantly, we were confident knowing every detail of the day had been thoughtfully planned and handled, which allowed us to be fully present with our guests and to enjoy the day to the fullest. Even the unforeseen mishaps felt like a breeze because of Lucky Penny’s quick thinking and commitment to making our day a one of one experience.

By the end of it all, we didn’t just feel like we had amazing planners—we felt like we had gained friends. They genuinely cared about us and our experience, and that showed in every decision and interaction. If you are considering Lucky Penny, know that you will be in the very best hands. We are endlessly grateful to them for making our wedding everything we hoped for and more.

Where to even start! Ciera and Kaitlyn are the absolute best! When we decided to have our wedding in Crested Butte, every person told us to hire Lucky Penny, and it was the best decision we made as we planned our perfect day!

They were super on top of all of our deadlines, emailing vendors, setting check ins, and helping us to navigate the possibly overwhelming number of details that a wedding entails! On top of that, they were so good at anticipating our styles and offering us things in budget that we loved! Our meetings with them felt more like hanging out with friends rather than just wedding planning.

And then the weekend of our wedding could not have been more smooth and perfect. I think most people naturally worry when planning a wedding, all the details won’t come together just as we envisioned, but ours could not have been more us! They managed all the logistics and made the day easy and allowed us to just focus on being present and joyful!

We could not recommend Ciera and Kaitlyn more highly!

Ciera and Kaitlyn are the absolute best. Melissa and I had an amazing time in Crested Butte, all thanks to the incredible work of Lucky Penny. Can't recommend them highly enough, they were unbelievable. They should get 13 stars. Every person that we know has come up to us since to tell us that this was their favorite wedding ever. Do yourself a favor and make sure you use Lucky Penny!
